title: Retain attributable correction history
description: Transaction corrections, category corrections, transfer/refund confirmation, revocation, and replacement remain explainable without mutating or deleting their prior facts.
target: 100% of lifecycle conformance events retain stable subject references, event type, reason, actor context, timestamp, prior and resulting state, and replacement reference where applicable.
load_condition: All correction and relationship lifecycle paths, including cascading relationship retirement during transaction void or supersession.
measurement: Automated history reconstruction tests that compare active actuals with the complete retained event chain.
rationale: Attribution makes financial corrections auditable and prevents silent rewriting. Supports G2, G3, G4, and G6.
